title: terminalia calamansanai
intro: Terminalia calamansanai, also known as the yellow dammar, is a plant species belonging to the Combretaceae family native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, primarily due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Terminalia calamansanai include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and aid in the treatment of various skin conditions such as acne and eczema. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and capsules, which are sold as dietary supplements to support overall health and well-being.
